text: Introducing Pangolin. Built for the Sola Security Hackathon.
Sola scans your workflows daily, classifying findings and alerting your team.

Our CLI pulls data from Sola MCP. Regex scans one hundred five workflows in a tenth of a second. GPT five point five reasons through attack chains. Six confirmed, zero false positives. Semgrep cross-validates all seventeen patterns.
The report shows severity, attack scenarios, and downloadable proof of concept files.
One command generates a fix and opens a GitHub pull request with full context.
Everything flows to Slack. A complete security loop.
